t0_utc.description: Epoch at t0. Optical RSA: coarse min-off-nadir sample (step_sec). Planned SAR RSA (AC-010): coarse min-|range_rate| seed (step_sec), not the execution epoch. Optical AE is refined to 1 ms (AC-008); planned SAR AE refinement belongs to AC-024.

phi_deg.description: Angle at t0 (deg). Optical RSA: historical unsigned off-nadir proxy (not roll). Planned SAR RSA may use it only as a coarse unsigned roll diagnostic, not final attitude. Optical AE attitude.phi_deg is signed roll (AC-008); the full SAR AE attitude contract belongs to AC-024.

min_off_nadir_deg.description: Minimum unsigned off-nadir (deg) from the current coarse merger; optical/compatibility diagnostic. It is not the SAR ground-incidence-angle constraint.

max_elevation_deg.description: Downlink peak elevation (deg) from GMAT SiteViewMaxElevationReport; omit if unavailable or outside [0, 90]

node_id.description: Node that produced this window (SATELLITE_NODE_ID or local)

attitude.description: Present for attitude_estimation when an access window exists. The current contract represents optical AE (AC-008). SAR AE (AC-024) must extend it with an unambiguous full-attitude representation and Doppler/range-rate residual; this roll/pitch-only block must not be interpreted as complete SAR attitude.

pitch_deg.description: Signed along-track pitch (deg) at refined t0; computed from EarthMJ2000Eq LOS (AC-008)

pitch_status.description: New runs emit computed only; placeholder retained for historical result compatibility
